ddls:
CREATE TABLE "stocks" (
  "ticker" TEXT /* Stock ticker symbol */,
  "stock_name" TEXT /* Name of the stock */,
  "sector" INTEGER /* Sector to which the stock belongs */,
  "industry" INTEGER /* Industry classification of the stock */,
  "market_cap" REAL /* Market capitalization of the stock */,
  "eps" REAL /* Earnings per share */,
  "pe_ratio" REAL /* Price-to-earnings ratio */,
  "dividend_yield" REAL /* Dividend yield */,
  "beta" REAL /* Beta coefficient */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("ticker"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_stocks_sector FOREIGN KEY ("sector") REFERENCES sectors ("sector_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_stocks_industry FOREIGN KEY ("industry") REFERENCES industries ("industry_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "market_data" (
  "data_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each market data entry */,
  "ticker" TEXT /* Stock ticker symbol */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date for the market data */,
  "open_price" REAL /* Opening price of the stock */,
  "high_price" REAL /* Highest price of the stock during the day */,
  "low_price" REAL /* Lowest price of the stock during the day */,
  "close_price" REAL /* Closing price of the stock */,
  "value" INTEGER /* Total value traded during the day */,
  "volume" INTEGER /* Volume of shares traded during the day */,
  "open_interest" INTEGER /* Open interest in futures contracts */,
  "percent_change" REAL /* Percentage change in price from the previous day */,
  "last_price" REAL /* Last traded price of the day */,
  "adj_close_price" REAL /* Adjusted closing price */,
  "pre_market_price" REAL /* Pre-market price */,
  "after_hours_price" REAL /* After-hours price */,
  "volume_weighted_average_price" REAL /* Volume-weighted average price (VWAP) */,
  "trading_status" TEXT /* Status of the stock (e.g., open, closed, halted) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("data_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_market_data_ticker FOREIGN KEY ("ticker") REFERENCES stocks ("ticker")
)

CREATE TABLE "sectors" (
  "sector_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each sector */,
  "sector_name" TEXT /* Name of the sector */,
  "sector_description" TEXT /* Description of the sector */,
  "market_weight" REAL /* Market weight of the sector */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("sector_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "industries" (
  "industry_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each industry */,
  "industry_name" TEXT /* Name of the industry */,
  "sector_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the sector the industry belongs to */,
  "industry_description" TEXT /* Description of the industry */,
  "market_weight" REAL /* Market weight of the industry */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("industry_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., client, analyst, admin) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date when the user account was created */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date of the user's last login */,
  "status" TEXT /* Account status (e.g., active, inactive) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_portfolios" (
  "portfolio_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user portfolio */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user who owns the portfolio */,
  "portfolio_name" TEXT /* Name of the user portfolio */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date when the portfolio was created */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date when the portfolio was last updated */,
  "total_value" REAL /* Total value of the portfolio */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("portfolio_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_portfolios_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "portfolio_stocks" (
  "portfolio_stock_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each stock in a portfolio */,
  "portfolio_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user portfolio */,
  "ticker" TEXT /* Stock ticker symbol */,
  "quantity" INTEGER /* Quantity of the stock in the portfolio */,
  "average_cost" REAL /* Average cost of the stock in the portfolio */,
  "total_value" REAL /* Total value of the stock in the portfolio */,
  "profit_loss" REAL /* Profit or loss of the stock in the portfolio */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("portfolio_stock_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_portfolio_stocks_ticker FOREIGN KEY ("ticker") REFERENCES stocks ("ticker"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_portfolio_stocks_portfolio_id FOREIGN KEY ("portfolio_id") REFERENCES user_portfolios ("portfolio_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "alerts" (
  "alert_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each alert */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user who created the alert */,
  "ticker" TEXT /* Stock ticker symbol */,
  "alert_type" TEXT /* Type of alert (e.g., price, volume) */,
  "threshold" REAL /* Threshold value for the alert */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date when the alert was created */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the alert (e.g., active, triggered) */,
  "triggered_at" TEXT /* Date when the alert was triggered */,
  "message" TEXT /* Message to be sent when the alert is triggered */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("alert_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_alerts_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_alerts_ticker FOREIGN KEY ("ticker") REFERENCES stocks ("ticker")
)

CREATE TABLE "news" (
  "news_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each news item */,
  "ticker" TEXT /* Stock ticker symbol */,
  "news_date" TEXT /* Date of the news */,
  "headline" TEXT /* Headline of the news */,
  "summary" TEXT /* Summary of the news */,
  "source" TEXT /* Source of the news */,
  "url" TEXT /* URL to the full news article */,
  "sentiment" TEXT /* Sentiment analysis of the news (e.g., positive, negative, neutral) */,
  "impact" TEXT /* Impact of the news on the stock (e.g., high, medium, low) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("news_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_news_ticker FOREIGN KEY ("ticker") REFERENCES stocks ("ticker")
)

CREATE TABLE "predictions" (
  "prediction_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each prediction */,
  "ticker" TEXT /* Stock ticker symbol */,
  "prediction_date" TEXT /* Date for which the prediction is made */,
  "predicted_price" REAL /* Predicted price of the stock */,
  "model_version" TEXT /* Version of the model used for prediction */,
  "confidence_score" REAL /* Confidence score of the prediction */,
  "model_description" TEXT /* Description of the model used for prediction */,
  "predicted_change" TEXT /* Predicted change in price (e.g., percentage) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("prediction_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_predictions_ticker FOREIGN KEY ("ticker") REFERENCES stocks ("ticker")
)

CREATE TABLE "analyst_ratings" (
  "rating_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each rating */,
  "ticker" TEXT /* Stock ticker symbol */,
  "rating_date" TEXT /* Date when the rating was given */,
  "rating" TEXT /* Rating given by the analyst (e.g., Buy, Hold, Sell) */,
  "analyst_name" TEXT /* Name of the analyst who provided the rating */,
  "firm" TEXT /* Firm the analyst belongs to */,
  "target_price" REAL /* Target price given by the analyst */,
  "rationale" TEXT /* Rationale behind the rating */,
  "confidence_level" TEXT /* Confidence level of the rating (e.g., high, medium, low) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("rating_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_analyst_ratings_ticker FOREIGN KEY ("ticker") REFERENCES stocks ("ticker")
)
